questionHtml:
In a hydrogen atom, the sum of the masses of a proton and of an electron is larger than the mass of the atom. Which interaction is mainly responsible for this difference?

A. Electromagnetic

B. Strong nuclear

C. Weak nuclear

D. Gravitational
